detail.description:
The latest "Kingdom" app begins!
Join your allies and journey to the uncharted battlefields of "Kingdom."

[Game Features]
■ The world of Kingdom depicted on an overwhelming scale
Advance with your allies across the vast land of Kingdom.
Fight alongside your allies on a variety of battlefields, taking advantage of terrain advantages as the battle situation changes in real time.

■ Large-scale army battles of up to 30 players
Attack and defend using the gigantic "Siege Tower" weapon,
Seize an opp
